ApiUrl.Name: Chronicle URL
ApiUrl.Hint: The base URL of your Chronicle instance (e.g., https://chronicle.example.com)

ApiKey.Name: API Key
ApiKey.Hint: API key with 'sync' permission from your Chronicle campaign settings

CampaignId.Name: Campaign ID
CampaignId.Hint: The UUID of your Chronicle campaign

SyncEnabled.Name: Enable Sync
SyncEnabled.Hint: Master toggle for all Chronicle sync features

SyncJournals.Name: Sync Journals
SyncJournals.Hint: Sync Chronicle entities with Foundry journal entries

SyncMaps.Name: Sync Maps
SyncMaps.Hint: Sync Chronicle maps with Foundry scenes (drawings, tokens)

SyncCalendar.Name: Sync Calendar
SyncCalendar.Hint: Sync Chronicle calendar with Calendaria or Simple Calendar module

SyncCharacters.Name: Sync Characters
SyncCharacters.Hint: Sync Foundry actors with Chronicle character entities (requires matching game system)

Dashboard.Title: Chronicle Sync
Dashboard.NotConfiguredHint: Go to Module Settings to enter your Chronicle URL, API key, and Campaign ID.

Entities.EmptyState: No entities found. Create entities in Chronicle or journals in Foundry to get started.

Maps.NoMaps: No maps found in this Chronicle campaign.

Shops.NoShops: No shops found in this campaign.
Shops.NoShopsHint: Create shop entities in Chronicle to see them here.
Shops.NoShopTypeHint: Add a "Shop" entity type to your campaign in Chronicle.

Calendar.NoCalendar: No calendar configured for this campaign in Chronicle.
Calendar.Disabled: Calendar sync is disabled. Enable it in Module Settings.
Calendar.NoModuleHint: Install Calendaria or Simple Calendar to enable calendar sync.

Characters.NoActorsHint: Create character actors in Foundry or character entities in Chronicle.
Characters.DisabledHint: Enable "Sync Characters" in Module Settings to sync actors with Chronicle.
Characters.NoSystem: Character sync requires a matching game system.
Characters.NoSystemHint: Your Foundry system must match a Chronicle game system with character field templates.
